scope: Pre-implementation 7-layer scan (L1–L4, L6, L7; L5 skipped)

findings.message: Personas P11 Robin, P5 Morgan, P9 Drew map 1:1 from research.md to product-spec user stories.
findings.evidence: research.md §2 (personas) → product-spec §2 (Must/Should/Could stories) with matching assignments.

findings.message: Problem statement (no public identity) translates directly to product-spec vision.
findings.evidence: research.md §1 → product-spec §1 Vision: 'giving every user the option to become a public creator'.

findings.message: Monetization delegation to feature 010 is consistent in both artifacts.
findings.evidence: research.md §5 (monetization) and product-spec §4.2 both defer billing to 010.

layers.name: product-spec ↔ spec.md

findings.message: spec.md defines only 6 high-level FRs; product-spec defines 30 FRs. Must Have detail is lost.

FR-003 (handle uniqueness <100ms), FR-005 (30d/14d cooldown), FR-007-009 (SSR metadata, display rules, privacy), FR-015 (≤5s consistency), FR-017-019 (collection constraints) are present in product-spec but absent from spec.md.
findings.evidence: Direct comparison of product-spec FR list to spec.md FR list.

findings.message: spec.md includes a known-drift disclaimer (§33-36) acknowledging the gap.
findings.evidence: spec.md: 'The detailed FR enumeration ... is carried in product-spec/product-spec.md pending revalidation or a formal crosswalk'.

layers.recommendation: Complete the formal crosswalk from product-spec FRs into spec.md before implementation begins. Until then, treat product-spec as the authoritative upstream.

findings.message: plan.md assumes the full 30-FR scope from product-spec/V-model while spec.md only provides 6 FRs.
findings.evidence: plan.md §24 references schema/cooldown/reservation/SEO/moderation concerns not in spec.md FRs.

findings.message: plan.md architecture traces to REQ-001..REQ-018 (V-model), which derive from product-spec, not spec.md.
findings.evidence: plan.md §32: 'Follows the V-Model decomposition in v-model/system-design.md'.

findings.message: All Must Have stories (US-001..US-006) are explicitly addressed in plan.md.
findings.evidence: plan.md §26: 'Must Have stories addressed: US-001, US-002, US-003, US-004, US-005, US-006'.

findings.message: 60 tasks across 7 phases align 1:1 with plan.md phase decomposition.
findings.evidence: tasks.md task count: 60 (T001..T060). Phase mapping matches plan.md §84-122.

findings.message: Each Must Have story has at least one task mapping.
Dependency graph is internally consistent and matches plan.md sequencing.
findings.evidence: tasks.md dependency chains: Setup → Schema → Domain APIs → Web/Widget → Analytics/Moderation → Integration → Verification.

findings.message: No implementation files found for planned creator-profiles modules.
findings.evidence: glob('**/*creator*') returned zero implementation matches. No packages/api/creator-profiles-api exists.

findings.message: Missing implementation is expected for a pre-implementation planning phase.
Research personas and needs are fully reflected in spec.md FRs and scope.
findings.evidence: P11 (handle) → FR-001; P5 (browse) → FR-001/Follow; P9 (embed) → FR-004; analytics → FR-005.

findings.message: Out-of-scope items from research match spec.md exclusions.
findings.evidence: Video hosting (013), Circle (011), AI bio (005), verified badge workflow are all in spec.md Out-of-Scope.

governance.evidence: spec.md §67 and tasks.md T005 enforce /api/v1/* across all 012 endpoints.
tasks.md T004 requires imports from @kitchensink/shared-recipe-core and forbids local duplicate core entities.
spec.md §31 defines public-profile scope and excludes circle (011) and published-lesson (013).

notes: tasks.md references packages/api/creator-profiles-api/* as a new planned package. This is not yet present in the workspace; T001 covers registration. No stale app/X references found.

recommendations.message: Resolve L2 CRITICAL by completing the formal crosswalk from product-spec/product-spec.md FRs (FR-001..FR-030) into spec.md. Until then, treat product-spec as the authoritative FR source.
Address L3 WARNING: after crosswalk, re-validate plan.md task-to-FR mappings to reference spec.md FRs rather than only product-spec FRs.
No action for L6: missing implementation is expected and correct for a pre-implementation planning scan.
